candidates.question: 出售货物时，我可以只卖出同色货物的一部分，保留剩下的吗？
candidates.evidence_quote: When taking this action, you must always sell the complete stack of tiles of that type, even if you would rather keep some in reserve.
candidates.review_notes: Players often misunderstand if they can partially sell a stack of goods to save some for later, but the rules strictly enforce selling the entire stack of that color.

candidates.question: 在回合中，我可以在什么时候花费银币从中央黑色仓库购买板块？
candidates.evidence_quote: This can be done at any time during your turn, i.e. before, during, between or after the two dice actions. To buy a hex tile, pay 2 silver coins
candidates.review_notes: Players might confuse when the black depot purchase can occur relative to their two dice actions, or mistakenly think it costs a die action instead of just silver coins.

candidates.question: 在单人游戏中，修道院板块的胜利点数是在游戏结束时才计算吗？
expected_terms: instead of at the end of the game
candidates.evidence_quote: Victory points from a monastery tile are added immediately after placing it (instead of at the end of the game).
candidates.review_notes: Players familiar with the base game might assume monastery scoring happens at the end, but the solo variant changes this timing.

candidates.question: 在单人模式中，当我完成一种颜色时，我还能获得胜利点数奖励吗？如果不能，我该怎么做？
candidates.evidence_quote: You won’t gain a victory point bonus when you complete a color. Instead, choose a hex tile from the black depot and place it directly on your duchy
candidates.review_notes: This is a major exception to the base game rules where completing a color grants a VP bonus; in solo mode it triggers a chain of taking tiles from the black depot instead.

candidates.question: 游戏结束时如果胜利点数平局，如何决定胜负？
candidates.evidence_quote: If there is a tie, the player with the fewest unused hex spaces in their duchy wins the game. If there is still a tie, the player who is farthest behind on the bridge is the winner.
candidates.review_notes: Players often forget the specific tiebreaker conditions and their order, making this a common point of confusion at the end of the game.

candidates.question: 游戏结束计分时，工人怎么换算胜利点？
candidates.evidence_quote: For every two worker chips: 1 victory point
candidates.review_notes: Players frequently miscalculate or assume each worker chip is worth 1 VP, rather than needing two chips for 1 VP.

candidates.question: 拥有修道院板块7时，放置畜牧板块获得的额外1分是只给新放置的板块，还是同牧场上所有计分的畜牧板块都有？
candidates.evidence_quote: you also gain 1 victory point for each livestock tile that scores at that time.
candidates.review_notes: Players often misunderstand whether the +1 VP applies only to the newly placed tile or all tiles in the pasture. The example clarifies it applies to all scoring tiles.

candidates.question: 修道院板块15在游戏结束时如何计分？未出售的货物算在种类里吗？
candidates.evidence_quote: you gain 2 victory points for each different type of goods you sold at least once during the game. Unsold goods are ignored.
candidates.review_notes: Players might mistakenly count unsold goods towards the types, or count the total quantity of goods sold instead of the number of different types.
